notes: B1-1 is a Business and Commercial district with bulk and density designation '-1'

Efficiency units: Maximum 10% of total units

Average dwelling unit size minimum: 500 gross residential sq ft per unit

Front setback: 15 feet or 12% of lot depth (whichever is less) as fixed standard, OR average front yard depth of nearest 2 lots on either side. Builder/property owner choice except on primary boulevards.

Side setback: Combined total width must equal 20% of lot width with neither setback less than 2 feet or 8% of lot width (whichever is greater); no setback required to exceed 5 feet. Applies to all principal buildings except townhouses.
Rear setback: 30% of lot depth or 50 feet (whichever is less) for principal buildings other than detached houses. Applies to all portions of building.

Side setback in RM5: combined total width of side setbacks must equal 20% of lot width with neither required setback less than 2 feet or 8% of lot width (whichever is greater); no side setback required to exceed 5 feet. Side setback for non-townhouse principal buildings: Combined total must equal 20% of lot width with neither required setback less than 2 feet or 8% of lot width (whichever greater); no single setback exceeds 5 feet
Rear setback for detached houses: 28% of lot depth or 50 feet (whichever less); for other principal buildings: 30% of lot depth or 50 feet (whichever less)

Maximum efficiency units: 20% of total units
